title: Adventure Star: Roll of Fate
description: Navigate through 4 progressively challenging grid-based levels to reach the Star's Core. Move tile by tile, interact with mysterious events using Space, and manage your HP carefully. Each event is influenced by fate—will luck be on your side? Collect treasures, avoid traps, and reach the exit of each level to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys or WASD: Move one tile Up/Left/Down/Right
Space: Interact with event tiles (stand on them and press Space)
Enter: Start the game from main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart (returns to main menu from game over screen)

title: Ao Oni: The Mansion's Shadow
description: Escape the haunted mansion while evading Ao Oni, a terrifying blue monster that stalks the halls. Navigate through 5 progressively challenging levels, each with unique layouts and puzzles. Find keys, unlock doors, and solve environmental puzzles to progress. Stay hidden in closets and behind furniture when Ao Oni is near. Break line of sight to escape chases. Complete all levels to escape the mansion and win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move player (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Shift (Hold): Sprint for faster movement
Space: Interact with doors, items, hiding spots
Z: Toggle flashlight (in dark levels)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (returns to title screen)

title: AquaSort Puzzle
description: Welcome to AquaSort Puzzle! Your goal is to sort colored liquids into tubes so that each tube contains only one color. Select a source tube, then pour its contents into a compatible destination tube. You can only pour if the colors match or the destination is empty, and there's enough space. Complete all 5 levels with strategic moves to win!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Navigate between tubes
Space: Select tube to pour from, then select destination to pour into
Z: Undo last move
ESC: Pause/Resume game
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
R: Restart (returns to start screen from game over)

title: Arena Reckoning: Pixel Horde
description: Arena Reckoning: Pixel Horde is a top-down survival auto-battler where you face endless waves of monsters across three increasingly challenging levels. Your character automatically attacks enemies while you focus on movement and strategic upgrade choices. Collect experience gems from defeated foes to level up and choose powerful upgrades. Survive timed waves, defeat mini-bosses and a final boss to claim victory. Each level ramps up difficulty with faster, stronger enemies and new threats. Master movement, make smart upgrade choices, and survive the pixel horde!
controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character
Space: Confirm upgrade selection
Shift: Pause/Unpause game
Enter: Start game from main menu
R: Restart and return to main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game

title: Arrow Words Challenge
description: Arrow Words Challenge is a crossword-style puzzle game where you fill in a grid of words using letter clues embedded directly in the grid. Each clue has an arrow pointing right or down to indicate the direction of the word. Complete all words correctly to win the level. Use hints wisely as they cost points. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels, each with larger grids and more complex words. Earn points for correct letters, completed words, and fast completion times!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen
Arrow Keys: Navigate between cells in the grid
A-Z: Type letters into selected cells
BACKSPACE: Delete letter and move back
SPACE: Jump to next empty cell in current word
TAB: Use hint to reveal a letter (costs points)

title: Baloot Blitz
description: Welcome to Baloot Blitz! A fast-paced card puzzle game inspired by the traditional Baloot card game. Cards fall from above into a grid, and you must arrange them to form special combinations. Create valid Baloot patterns like Sary (four of a kind), Khamsa (five consecutive cards), and more to clear cards and score points. Progress through increasingly challenging levels, managing limited time and grid space. Don't let the cards stack to the top, or it's game over!
controls:
Left Arrow: Move falling card left
Right Arrow: Move falling card right
Down Arrow: Speed up card fall
Space: Drop card instantly
Z: Rotate card order (in multi-card mode)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Beat Line
description: Guide a continuously moving line through rhythmic paths filled with obstacles. Time your turns perfectly to the beat of the music as you navigate increasingly challenging tracks. Master the rhythm, avoid collisions, and complete all three levels to prove your skills. Each perfect turn builds your combo and boosts your score!
controls:
SPACE: Execute 90-degree turn (tap to the beat!)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
ENTER: Start game / Confirm menu selection
R: Restart (return to start screen)
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus

title: Bell Village Echoes
description: Escape from the cursed Bell Village by exploring eerie locations, solving intricate puzzles, and uncovering dark secrets. Navigate through three progressively challenging levels set in a haunted shrine, sanctum, and crypt. Find hidden objects, decipher codes, and piece together ancient scrolls before time runs out. Use your wits to unlock doors, solve riddles, and perform a final ritual to break free from the echoing curse.
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Navigate between scene viewpoints
Arrow Up/Down: Cycle through interactive objects in current scene
Space: Interact with selected object / Use active item / Confirm action
Z: Open/Close inventory
A/D (in inventory): Navigate through collected items
Shift (hold): Request hint (score penalty)
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)

title: Bellhop Blitz
description: Welcome to Bellhop Blitz! You're managing a bustling hotel where efficiency is key. Guide your bellhop to clean dirty rooms, check in waiting guests at reception, and collect payments from departing guests. Each level presents a larger hotel with more rooms and faster-paced challenges. Hire staff to automate tasks and upgrade your abilities to handle the rush. Meet revenue targets and purchase essential upgrades before time runs out to advance through 4 increasingly complex hotels. Keep guests happy – if too many leave unsatisfied, it's game over!
controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move bellhop up, left, down, right
Space: Interact with nearby objects (clean room, check-in guest, collect payment)
Shift: Open/Close upgrade menu (pauses game)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to main menu

title: Bingo Blitz Challenge
description: Welcome to Bingo Blitz Challenge! You have a 5x5 Bingo card with numbers 1-75. Numbers are called one by one - quickly mark them on your card to achieve BINGO (5 in a row: horizontal, vertical, diagonal, or 4 corners). Complete each level by reaching the target score within 3 minutes. Use boosters strategically to maximize your score and progress through 4 increasingly challenging levels!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate squares on your Bingo card
Space: Mark the currently selected square / Activate Instant Mark Booster
Shift: Activate Score Multiplier Booster (2x points for 5 seconds)
Z: Activate Free Mark Booster (mark any square regardless of called number)
Enter: Start game / Confirm selections
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Buddy Bash: Stress Relief Sandbox
description: Buddy Bash is a physics-based stress relief game where you interact with Buddy, a ragdoll character. Use various weapons and your bare hands to inflict damage, rack up points, and complete increasingly challenging levels. Each level has a target score you must reach before time runs out. Stretch, toss, punch, shoot, and explode your way through 5 unique environments. Earn Bucks to unlock new weapons and outfits for Buddy!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart (return to main menu)
SPACE: Fire/activate currently selected weapon
SHIFT: Reset Buddy's position and health
Arrow Keys: Cycle through weapons (LEFT/RIGHT) and outfits (UP/DOWN)
Z: Quick select Hand/Punch mode

title: Buddy Brawler Blitz
description: Welcome to Buddy Brawler Blitz! Your mission is to score points by interacting with Buddy, an indestructible ragdoll, using various weapons and physics-based actions. Progress through 4 increasingly challenging levels, each with a unique environment and score target. Earn coins to unlock powerful new weapons. Master combos and strategic weapon use to maximize your score before time runs out!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu
SPACE: Kick Buddy at cursor position
Z: Use selected weapon
ARROW LEFT/RIGHT: Cycle through weapons
SHIFT (hold): Precision mode for selected weapon

title: Chain Pop!
description: Chain Pop! is a colorful puzzle game where you connect adjacent balls of the same color to clear them from the grid. Your goal is to complete level objectives by clearing specific numbers of colored balls and reaching target scores within a limited number of moves. Chain longer sequences for bigger bonus points! Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels with expanding grids, more colors, and strategic obstacles. Plan your moves carefully to achieve victory!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the title screen
ARROW KEYS: Navigate the grid (visual cursor feedback)
SPACE: Select/confirm ball to start chain, or use booster on selected position
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to title screen
Z: Activate bomb booster (clears 3x3 area around selected ball)

title: Cheese Chase: Mouse Escape
description: You are a clever mouse on a mission to collect all the delicious cheese scattered throughout increasingly dangerous environments! Navigate through 5 challenging levels filled with patrolling cats. Collect every piece of cheese to activate the mouse hole exit, then make your escape. But beware - one touch from a cat and you'll lose a life! Master the art of timing, precision jumping, and careful planning to complete all levels and claim victory.
controls:
Arrow Left: Move left
Arrow Right: Move right
Arrow Up: Jump (when on ground)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Chef's Kitchen Challenge
description: Welcome to Chef's Kitchen Challenge! Master the art of cooking through precise mini-games. Complete recipes by chopping ingredients, mixing batters, and cooking to perfection. Progress through 5 levels of culinary mastery, from simple salads to gourmet three-course meals. Execute each cooking step with precision and timing to achieve high scores and unlock new challenges!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from main menu
ARROW KEYS: Navigate menus and recipe selection
SPACE: Confirm selections, perform timed cooking actions (flip, remove from heat)
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to main menu
Z: Go back in menus, alternative confirm action
SHIFT: Toggle pause (alternative to ESC)

title: Coastal Conquest: Island Skirmish
description: Command your forces in this tactical island warfare game! Deploy infantry, artillery, and tanks strategically to destroy the enemy headquarters while protecting your own. Manage limited resources wisely, exploit terrain advantages, and overcome increasingly fortified enemy positions across 4 challenging levels. Victory requires careful planning and smart unit composition!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select (Menu/UI navigation)
SPACE: End Turn / Confirm Action
Z: Deploy Infantry Unit
Shift: Deploy Artillery Unit
Arrow Up: Deploy Tank Unit
ENTER: Start Game
ESC: Pause/Unpause Game
R: Restart (from Game Over screen)

title: Color Match Royale
description: Welcome to Color Match Royale! Race against AI opponents to be the first to empty your hand of cards. Match the color or number of the top card on the discard pile. Use action cards strategically to skip opponents, reverse turn order, or force them to draw cards. Wild cards let you change the active color. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels, from friendly beginners to ruthless experts. Score points by winning rounds - the more cards left in opponents' hands, the higher your score!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Navigate through your hand to select a card
Space: Play the selected card (or draw if no valid play)
Z: Call "UNO" when you have one card left (Levels 4-5 only)
Enter: Start game from main menu
Esc: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Connect Cascade
description: Connect Cascade is a color-matching puzzle game where you connect adjacent dots of the same color to clear them from the grid. Form squares to clear all dots of that color! Complete level objectives like clearing specific colored dots or dropping anchors to the bottom before running out of moves. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels that test your strategic thinking and pattern recognition.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor across the grid
Space (Hold): Select dot and extend path to adjacent same-colored dots
Space (Release): Confirm and clear the connected path
Shift (while holding Space): Cancel current path selection
Enter: Start game from main menu
Escape: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Court Clash: P5 Tennis
description: Welcome to Court Clash: P5 Tennis! Face off against increasingly skilled AI opponents in intense 1-on-1 tennis matches. Your character automatically moves to intercept the ball - focus on perfecting your shots! Win rallies by making your opponent miss, hit out of bounds, or fail to clear the net. First to score 3 points wins the match. Complete all 4 levels to become the Tournament Champion!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
ARROW KEYS: Control shot direction and power during gameplay
SPACE: Execute your shot / Pause and resume the game
ESC: Pause and resume the game
R: Restart and return to the main menu
Z: Quick return to main menu from any screen

title: Cozy Constructor
description: Welcome to Cozy Constructor! Arrange furniture in empty rooms to create the perfect living spaces. Each level presents you with a grid-based room and an inventory of furniture items. Your goal is to place all items according to specific rules - no overlaps allowed, and some items must be positioned strategically (like monitors on desks or rugs under sofas). Complete 5 increasingly challenging levels before time runs out. Plan carefully, work quickly, and become the master interior designer!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the currently held furniture item around the grid
Space: Confirm placement of the held item onto the grid
Z: Rotate the held item 90 degrees clockwise
Shift: Cancel current placement and return item to inventory
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
Escape: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Crazy Kick!
description: Welcome to Crazy Kick! You are in direct control of a football with one mission: score goals! Navigate through 5 increasingly challenging levels, from a simple training pitch to the World Cup Final. Each level features AI-controlled defenders trying to intercept you. Avoid tackles (you have limited tackle allowances), dodge obstacles, and race against the clock to score. Master your ball control, use the dash ability strategically, and become the champion!
controls:
Arrow Keys or WASD: Apply continuous force to move the ball in the corresponding direction
Space: Dash - Apply a powerful burst of speed in your current movement direction
Enter: Start the game from the main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the main menu

title: CrossMath Challenge
description: CrossMath Challenge is a mathematical puzzle game where you must fill empty cells in a grid to create correct equations both horizontally and vertically. Each puzzle contains pre-filled numbers and operators (+, -, *, /). Your goal is to complete all four progressively challenging levels by solving each grid puzzle correctly. Remember: equations follow the standard order of operations (multiplication and division before addition and subtraction). You have 2 attempts per level - use them wisely!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between empty cells
Number Keys (1-9): Enter numbers into selected cell
Space: Submit puzzle for validation
Backspace: Clear current cell
Shift: Use hint (reveals one cell, -100 points)
Enter: Start game / Continue to next level
Escape: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Detective's Eye: Hidden Objects
description: Find all hidden objects in each scene before time runs out! Search through increasingly cluttered environments - from a tidy study to a chaotic attic. Click on objects from the list at the bottom of the screen. Be careful: wrong clicks cost you precious seconds! Use hints wisely when you're stuck. Complete all 3 levels to win the game.
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu
ARROW KEYS: Pan the camera view (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Z: Zoom in on the scene
SHIFT: Zoom out
SPACE: Use a hint (limited per level)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start menu

title: Dungeon Dasher
description: Navigate through 5 challenging levels of procedurally generated dungeon rooms. Move grid-by-grid to dodge enemies and projectiles. Stand still to auto-attack the nearest foe. Clear each room to earn powerful upgrades that stack throughout your run. Defeat increasingly difficult enemies including melee grunts, ranged shooters, heavy tanks, and a final boss. Survive to the end to claim victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move one grid cell in the corresponding direction
Spacebar: Confirm upgrade selection / Start game from menu / Resume from pause
Z: Pause/Unpause the game
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Esc: Pause the game
R: Restart from game over screen (returns to title)

title: Farkle Fortune
description: Farkle Fortune is a strategic dice game where you compete against an AI opponent to be the first to reach the target score. Roll six dice, select scoring combinations, and decide whether to bank your points or risk rolling again for more. Watch out for Farkles - rolling no scoring dice loses all points for that turn! Progress through three increasingly challenging levels with rising target scores and smarter AI opponents.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Select dice (navigate through dice)
Space: Roll dice / Roll again
B: Bank score (when minimum score reached)
Z: Deselect all dice
Enter: Start game / Continue
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Fling Feathers
description: Launch birds from your slingshot to destroy pig fortresses and save the eggs! Use physics to your advantage by toppling structures and eliminating all the green pigs. Each level presents stronger defenses and tougher enemies. Master different bird abilities and aim strategically to complete all 5 levels with limited birds. Clear all pigs to win each stage!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu
SPACE (Hold): Aim slingshot - adjust with arrow keys while holding
SPACE (Release): Launch the bird
SPACE (Tap in flight): Activate bird's special ability
Arrow Up/Down: Adjust launch angle (while holding Space)
Arrow Left/Right: Adjust launch power - Left increases, Right decreases (while holding Space)
A/D: Cycle through available birds before launching
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Fling Feathers Blitz
description: Fling Feathers Blitz is a physics-based puzzle game where you launch birds from a slingshot to destroy structures and eliminate all pigs on each level. Master the unique abilities of different bird types - Red birds are basic projectiles, Blue birds split into three, and Yellow birds boost their speed mid-flight. Complete all 5 levels by strategically using your limited birds to topple wooden and stone structures, earning points for destruction and bonus points for unused birds. Each level increases in difficulty with more complex structures and better-protected pigs!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
SPACE: Hold to grab and aim the slingshot, release to launch the bird
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT): Adjust slingshot aim while holding SPACE
Z: Activate the current bird's special ability while in flight
ESC: Pause or unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the start screen

title: Flow Frenzy: Pipe Puzzle
description: Connect the pipes from the blue water source to the cup by rotating pipe segments. Navigate the grid with arrow keys, rotate pipes with Space/Shift, and press Z to release the water. Complete each level before time runs out to progress through increasingly complex puzzles with obstacles and new pipe types.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor on grid
Space: Rotate pipe clockwise 90°
Shift: Rotate pipe counter-clockwise 90°
Z: Release water / Confirm selection
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Return to start screen

title: FruitDrop Fusion
description: FruitDrop Fusion is a physics-based puzzle game where you drop fruits into a container to create larger fruits through fusion. When two identical fruits collide and settle, they merge into the next tier fruit. Progress through 4 challenging levels with different goals and difficulty settings. Create strategic combos for bonus points and reach the ultimate goal: creating a Watermelon! Watch out for the lose line at the top - if any fruit crosses it, it's game over!
controls:
Arrow Left / A: Move drop position left
Arrow Right / D: Move drop position right
Space / Arrow Down / S: Drop the fruit
Enter: Start game / Restart from game over
Escape / P: Pause / Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Gem Duel Tactics
description: Gem Duel Tactics is a turn-based Match-3 puzzle game where you compete against an AI opponent to score the highest points. Match 3 or more gems of the same type by swapping adjacent gems. Create cascading combos for bonus points! Charge your special Booster ability by matching blue star gems, then unleash it for strategic advantages. Complete 4 increasingly challenging levels by outscoring the AI within the turn limit. Master the board, plan your moves carefully, and become the ultimate Gem Master!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor on the grid
Space: Select/swap gems, confirm menu options
Shift: Activate your charged Booster ability
Enter: Start game from title screen
Escape: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

title: Gold Rush Harvest
description: Welcome to Gold Rush Harvest! Build and manage your northern farm through 5 challenging levels. Plant crops, raise livestock, produce goods, and fulfill orders to earn gold and experience. Unlock new territories and embark on expedition mini-games to gather rare resources. Complete all story objectives to achieve the ultimate Klondike Dream and win the game!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ARROW KEYS: Navigate and select options in menus
SPACE: Interact with selected farm object (plant, harvest, collect, produce)
SHIFT: Hold to view detailed information about objects
Z: Cancel action or close menus
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Goodville Harvest
description: Welcome to Goodville Harvest! You've inherited a run-down farm that needs renovation. Plant crops, raise animals, craft goods, and fulfill orders to earn coins and experience. Progress through 5 renovation stages by completing story quests. Manage your farm efficiently to reach the final Grand Opening Festival and restore the farm to its former glory!
controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Pan camera view across the farm
Space: Confirm selection in menus
Shift: Hold to show detailed information
Z: Cancel/close menus
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Grand Cross Tactics
description: Grand Cross Tactics is a turn-based tactical card battle game. Command your hero through 5 challenging levels, each filled with increasingly dangerous enemies. During your turn, select and play ability cards to attack, defend, heal, and buff yourself. Manage your Health Points (HP) and Ability Points (AP) wisely to survive enemy assaults. Defeat all enemies in each level to progress. Clear all 5 levels to achieve victory!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu
LEFT/RIGHT ARROW: Select ability card during your turn
SPACE: Play selected ability card
SHIFT: End your turn early
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to menu (from game over or win screen)

title: Gravity Guide
description: Guide falling objects into the target zone at the bottom of the screen using your platform. Complete 5 increasingly challenging levels by successfully catching the required number of objects before time runs out. Watch out for obstacles that block your path, and adapt to moving targets in later levels. Precision and timing are key!
controls:
Arrow Left: Move platform left
Arrow Right: Move platform right
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: GridBlock Strategist
description: GridBlock Strategist is a grid-based puzzle game where you strategically place block pieces on a 9×9 Sudoku-style grid. Complete full rows, columns, or 3×3 subgrids to clear them and earn points. Chain clears together for combo bonuses and build streaks for extra points. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels, each requiring a higher score to advance. The game ends when none of your available blocks can fit on the grid. Master the art of efficient placement to achieve the highest score!
controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Select block piece from available options
Arrow Keys (Up/Down/Left/Right) or WASD: Move placement cursor on grid
Space: Place selected block at cursor position
Enter: Start game / Confirm menu selections
Escape: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: Grid Garden Defenders
description: Grid Garden Defenders is a lane-based tower defense game where you must protect your garden from waves of zombies. Plant Sunflowers to generate sun currency, deploy Peashooters to attack zombies, and use Wall-nuts as defensive barriers. Zombies march down 5 lanes trying to reach your house. If any zombie reaches the left edge, you lose! Complete all 5 increasingly challenging levels to win. Manage your sun resources wisely and place plants strategically to defend against Basic and Conehead Zombies.
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
1, 2, 3: Select plant type (Sunflower, Peashooter, Wall-nut)
Arrow Keys: Move plant placement cursor on the grid
SPACE: Place selected plant at cursor position
Z: Activate Plant Food on the plant at cursor position (if available)
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to main menu

title: Grid Logic
description: Grid Logic is a classic Sudoku puzzle game. Fill the 9x9 grid so that each row, column, and 3x3 box contains the digits 1-9 exactly once. Start with pre-filled numbers and use logic to complete the puzzle. Choose from four difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, and Expert. Earn points for correct placements, but beware - five incorrect moves and it's game over!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between cells
1-9: Enter number in selected cell
Space: Toggle pencil mark mode (add small candidate numbers)
Shift: Clear selected cell
Z: Undo last action
Enter: Start game / Confirm selections
Esc: Pause / Resume game
R: Restart (return to menu)

title: Grid Tactics: 3-in-a-Row
description: Grid Tactics: 3-in-a-Row is a turn-based strategy game where you compete against an AI opponent to get three marks in a row. Navigate the grid with arrow keys and place your X marks strategically. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels with growing grid sizes (3x3 to 11x11) and smarter AI opponents. Win by forming a horizontal, vertical, or diagonal line of three X's before the AI gets three O's. Earn points for wins, draws, and bonuses for speed and difficulty!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate the grid to select a cell
Space: Place your X mark in the selected cell
Enter: Start game from menu / Confirm menu selections
Escape: Pause game during play
R: Restart and return to main menu
Shift: Quick restart level (from game over screen)

title: Gridlock Duel
description: Challenge an AI opponent in this strategic grid-based battle! Place your X marks strategically to form a line before the AI completes its O line. Progress through 5 increasingly difficult levels with larger grids and smarter AI opponents. Win rounds to advance, earn points, and set a high score. One mistake means starting over from Level 1!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate the grid cursor to select cells
Space or Z: Place your X mark in the selected cell
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to title screen

title: Happy Hoof Care
description: Welcome to Happy Hoof Care! You're managing a zoo where adorable animals need your care. Play mini-games to keep your animals happy by shaving alpacas, showering elephants, guiding them through mazes, and feeding giraffes. Successfully complete mini-games to increase animal happiness and earn points. Progress through 5 levels by completing enough mini-games while keeping your animals happy. If any animal's happiness drops to 0% or you fail too many mini-games, it's game over. Can you become the ultimate Zoo Tycoon?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, move cursor/tool in mini-games, control animal in maze
Space: Confirm menu selections, activate tools (hold to shave/shower/spray), grab/release food
Shift: Go back to previous menu, cancel actions
Enter: Start the game from main menu
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to main menu from game over screen

title: Harbor Merge Mystery
description: Welcome to Harbor Merge Mystery! You've inherited a dilapidated harbor restaurant and must restore it to its former glory while uncovering the island's secrets. Merge identical items on the grid to create higher-level dishes, then fulfill customer orders by dragging completed items to the Order Zone. Progress through 5 challenging levels, each bringing you closer to the truth. Watch out - if your board fills up with no possible merges, it's game over!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
ARROW KEYS: Navigate through grid cells (for keyboard control mode)
SPACE: Select/drop item at cursor position (keyboard mode) or toggle pause
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to main menu
Z: Confirm item merge or order fulfillment (keyboard mode)

title: Heroic Impact Arena
description: Command a team of 3 Heroes in tactical turn-based combat against waves of Villains across 5 challenging levels. Select your Heroes, choose their abilities wisely, and target enemies strategically. Master the elemental system where Fire beats Nature, Nature beats Water, and Water beats Fire. Manage ability cooldowns and status effects to emerge victorious. Defeat all enemies to progress through levels and achieve the highest score!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Select Hero (in character select) or Target (in target select)
Arrow Up/Down: Select Ability (in ability select)
Space: Confirm selection or execute action
Z: Cancel current selection and go back
Shift: End current player turn early
Enter: Start game from main menu
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Hogwarts: Cursed Vault Mystery
description: Welcome to Hogwarts: Cursed Vault Mystery! You are a student investigating the mysterious Cursed Vaults hidden within Hogwarts. Progress through five years of magical education by completing tasks, making dialogue choices, and winning duels. Manage your energy wisely, develop your attributes (Courage, Empathy, Knowledge), and earn House Points. Uncover the secrets and solve the mystery to win the game!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESCAPE: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to start screen
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and dialogue choices
SPACE: Confirm selections and advance dialogue
SHIFT: Toggle attribute panel visibility (during gameplay)
Z: Quick action key (context-sensitive)

title: "Welcome to Hogwarts",
description: Welcome to Hogwarts Spellbound: The Cursed Scrolls! You are a young wizard investigating the mystery of the Cursed Vaults at Hogwarts. Progress through three years of magical education by completing tasks, casting spells in mini-games, and making crucial dialogue choices. Manage your energy wisely, develop your attributes (Courage, Empathy, Knowledge), and unravel the secrets hidden within the castle walls. Complete all chapters to solve the mystery and graduate as a true magical hero!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
SPACE: Advance dialogue, confirm choices, perform Quick-Time Events (QTE)
ARROW UP/DOWN: Navigate dialogue options and menu choices
W/A/S/D: Directional inputs for spell tracing mini-games
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to main menu from Game Over screen

title: Hotel Dash: P5 Edition
description: Welcome to Hotel Dash: P5 Edition! You're managing a busy hotel where guests arrive seeking service. Your goal is to satisfy their needs quickly before their patience runs out. Check guests into rooms, serve them food from the kitchen, and keep rooms clean. Each satisfied guest earns you coins. Meet the level's coin target within the time limit while keeping dissatisfied guests to a minimum. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels to become the ultimate hotel manager!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate the selection cursor between guests, rooms, reception, kitchen, and staff members.
Space: Select the highlighted entity. Select a guest first, then select a service location to assign tasks. Select staff (Monica) to clean dirty rooms.
Shift: Cancel current selection and return to neutral state.
Enter: Start the game from the main menu.
Esc: Pause/Unpause during gameplay.
R: Return to start screen from game over.

title: Klondike Classic HTML5
description: Klondike Classic HTML5 is a card game where you must move all 52 cards to four foundation piles, building them up by suit from Ace to King. Cards in the tableau can be moved between columns in descending rank and alternating colors. Draw cards from the stock pile when needed. Progress through 4 levels with increasing difficulty, from simple 1-card draws to timed challenges with 3-card draws. Use hints and unlimited undos to help solve each puzzle!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and UI (if applicable)
Space: Draw card(s) from stock pile
Z: Undo last move
Shift: Request hint (highlights a valid move)
Enter: Start game / Continue to next level
Escape: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Lucky Merge Defense
description: Lucky Merge Defense is a grid-based tower defense game where luck meets strategy! Summon random units using currency, merge identical adjacent units to create powerful upgraded defenders, and protect your base from waves of monsters. Every summon and merge is a gamble - will you get the units you need to survive? Use the roulette for game-changing rewards, but manage your resources wisely. Complete all 3 levels to achieve victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor on the grid
Space: Summon a random unit (costs currency)
Shift: Place unit / Select unit for merge / Confirm merge
Z: Spin the roulette wheel for random rewards (costs currency)
Enter: Start game from main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Ludo Dash
description: Welcome to Ludo Dash! Race against an AI opponent to get all 4 of your pieces home first. Roll the dice, move strategically, and cut opponent pieces to send them back. You need a 6 to bring pieces out from home base. Land on opponent pieces to cut them (except on safe spots). Navigate through progressively challenging levels with smarter AI and trickier board conditions. Complete all 3 levels to win!
controls:
SPACE: Roll dice / Confirm piece selection / Menu actions
ARROW UP: Select previous piece (when multiple pieces can move)
ARROW DOWN: Select next piece (when multiple pieces can move)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Mob Multiplier Mayhem
description: Lead your mob army to victory! Fire projectiles through multiplier gates to spawn units that automatically march toward the enemy base. Deploy powerful champions strategically to break through obstacles and boost your forces. Destroy the enemy base before time runs out to advance through three increasingly challenging levels. Master your aim, timing, and resource management to achieve the highest score!
controls:
Arrow Left: Rotate cannon counter-clockwise
Arrow Right: Rotate cannon clockwise
Space: Fire projectile
Shift: Deploy Tank Champion (breaks obstacles)
Z: Deploy Speed Champion (moves faster)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: "Image to Word",
description: Help Momo learn English vocabulary! Progress through 5 challenging levels, each focusing on different word types and mini-games. Match images to words, choose correct definitions, spell words by typing, and complete sentences. Earn points for correct answers, build streaks for bonus points, and race against the clock. Each level gets progressively harder with new vocabulary and game mechanics. Can you master all levels and achieve the highest score?
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu
ARROW KEYS: Navigate menu options and highlight answer choices
SPACE/ENTER: Confirm selection or submit answer
KEYS 1-4: Directly select answer option in multiple choice
KEYS A-Z: Type letters in spelling challenges
BACKSPACE: Delete letter when typing
SHIFT: Capitalize letters when typing
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over
H: Use hint (costs 100 points)

title: Neon Bike Flip
description: Perform daring stunts on your neon motorcycle! Navigate challenging tracks, execute perfect flips in mid-air, and land safely to progress through 5 increasingly difficult levels. Master the physics-based controls to maintain speed, accumulate points for flips and smooth landings, and reach the finish line without crashing. Complete all levels to prove you're the ultimate stunt rider!
controls:
Arrow Left: Rotate bike counter-clockwise
Arrow Right: Rotate bike clockwise
ENTER: Start game / Confirm selections
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: "Build the Barn",
description: Welcome to Northern Harvest! Build and manage your frontier farm in the northern wilderness. Plant crops, raise animals, construct buildings, and explore expeditions to gather resources. Complete quests from Kate and Paul to unlock new content and expand your farm. Progress through 5 farm levels by earning XP, upgrading your homestead to achieve prosperity. Manage your resources wisely - if you run out of coins and can't recover, your adventure ends!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen
Arrow Keys: Pan the camera view
Space: Quick harvest all ready crops and collect all ready animal products on screen
W: Toggle Build Menu
A: Toggle Inventory
S: Toggle Task List
D: Toggle World Map / Return to Farm
Shift (Hold) + Click: Multi-select mode for tilling or planting

title: NumGrid Solver
description: Solve mathematical grid puzzles by filling in missing numbers! Each row and column contains an equation that must equal the given result. Use logic and math skills to deduce the correct values. Complete 5 increasingly challenging levels with up to 2 mistakes allowed per level. Use hints wisely - you only get 3 per game session!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu screen
ARROW KEYS: Navigate between empty cells in the grid
Z: Clear the selected cell
SPACE: Confirm and place the staged number into the selected cell
SHIFT: Use a hint (reveals one correct number, 3 hints total)
R: Restart game and return to menu
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
Number Keys 0-9: Input numbers into selected cells

title: Number Surge
description: Number Surge is an action-puzzle runner where you control a numbered block racing forward through a challenging obstacle course. Absorb smaller numbered blocks to grow your value, but avoid larger numbers and deadly hazards! Navigate wisely to build the highest number possible, then use your accumulated power to smash through numerical walls at the end of each level. Complete all 5 levels to become the Number Master!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally along the track
Space: Select menu options / Continue after level complete
Shift: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
Enter: Start game from main screen
Esc: Pause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Numbered Canvas Masterpiece
description: Welcome to Numbered Canvas Masterpiece! Your goal is to complete beautiful artworks by filling numbered segments with their matching colors. Select a color from the palette at the bottom, then click on segments with the same number to fill them. Complete all 5 levels of increasing complexity to master the art of paint-by-numbers. Zoom and pan to see intricate details and work your way through simple shapes to complex masterpieces!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game
ARROW KEYS: Pan the canvas (navigate around the artwork)
SPACE: Select next color in palette
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Ocean Hunter: Cannon Fury
description: Ocean Hunter: Cannon Fury is an arcade shooter where you control a powerful cannon at the ocean floor, defending against waves of sea creatures. Your mission is to hunt fish across 4 challenging levels, each with increasing difficulty. Destroy different types of fish to earn points - from small sardines to massive boss creatures like sharks and the legendary Giant Squid. Complete each level by reaching the target score before time runs out. Master your aim and timing to become the ultimate ocean hunter!
controls:
Arrow Left (←): Rotate cannon counter-clockwise
Arrow Right (→): Rotate cannon clockwise
Space: Fire projectile
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to menu from game over screen

title: Okey Solitaire
description: Welcome to Okey Solitaire! Your goal is to arrange your 14 tiles into valid sets (3 or 4 tiles of the same number in different colors) and runs (3+ consecutive numbered tiles of the same color). Compete against 3 AI opponents to be the first to complete a winning hand and declare "Okey". Each turn, draw a tile from the center pile or an opponent's discard, then rearrange your hand and discard one tile. A special Okey tile acts as a wild card. Win rounds to progress through 3 increasingly challenging levels!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Navigate tiles in your hand or move a picked-up tile
Arrow Up: Focus on draw piles (center or opponent's discard)
Arrow Down: Return focus to your hand
Space: Draw from selected pile, pick up/place down a tile in hand
D: Discard the currently picked-up tile
Z: Declare Okey (attempt to win the round)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to menu

title: Orderly Sort
description: Welcome to Orderly Sort! Your goal is to organize scattered items into their matching containers before time runs out. Each item has a specific color and shape, and must be placed in the correct container. Navigate through 5 progressively challenging levels, each with more items to sort and less time. Earn points for correct placements, but lose points for mistakes. Can you achieve the perfect sort?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the selector to highlight items and containers
Space: Pick up a highlighted item / Drop the held item into a container
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Esc: Pause / Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the title screen

title: P5 Bubble Pop!
description: Pop bubbles by matching 3 or more of the same color! Aim your launcher, fire bubbles to create matches, and clear the entire board before running out of shots. Plan carefully - detached bubbles fall and earn bonus points! Progress through 4 challenging levels with increasing difficulty, special rock bubbles, and descending ceilings. Earn power-ups: BOMB to clear nearby bubbles and BEAM SHOT to cut through lines. Can you achieve 3 stars on every level?
controls:
Arrow Left: Rotate launcher left
Arrow Right: Rotate launcher right
Space: Fire bubble
Shift: Activate BEAM SHOT power-up (when available)
Z: Activate BOMB power-up (when available)
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: P5 Marksman
description: You are an elite sniper tasked with eliminating hostile targets across 5 challenging missions. Use your scope to zoom in, carefully aim at designated targets, and take them out with precision. Beware of civilians - hitting an innocent bystander results in immediate mission failure. Manage your ammunition wisely, reload when necessary, and complete each mission within the time limit. Earn bonus points for headshots and accuracy. Progress through increasingly difficult scenarios from training grounds to the final strike operation.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Pan camera view (alternative to fine-tuning aim)
Space: Fire weapon
Shift: Reload weapon
Z: Quick scope toggle (2x zoom on/off)
W: Zoom in
S: Zoom out
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to main menu)

title: Penguin Dash: Arctic Escape
description: Guide your penguin through the treacherous Arctic in this fast-paced lane runner! Switch between three lanes, jump over obstacles, slide under barriers, and collect fish while rescuing fellow penguins. Complete all three levels to escape the frozen wilderness. Watch out for octopuses and gaps in the ice! Use power-ups wisely to boost your survival chances.
controls:
Arrow Up: Jump over low obstacles and gaps
Arrow Down: Slide under high obstacles
Arrow Left: Move to left lane
Arrow Right: Move to right lane
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to menu)

title: Photo Jigsaw Blitz
description: Photo Jigsaw Blitz is a fast-paced puzzle game where you assemble fragmented photo pieces into complete images against the clock. Select and move puzzle pieces around the canvas to align them correctly. When two pieces are close enough and properly aligned, they'll automatically snap together. Chain multiple snaps for bonus points! Complete 4 increasingly challenging levels, each with more pieces and tighter time limits. Race against time to complete the masterpiece!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from the start screen
SPACE: Select/deselect the nearest puzzle piece or group
Arrow Keys: Move selected piece/group (normal speed)
SHIFT + Arrow Keys: Move selected piece/group (fine-tuned, slower speed)
Z: Rotate selected piece/group 90° counter-clockwise (enabled in levels 2-4)
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Pirate Timing Clash
description: Battle through 5 increasingly challenging levels of pirate combat! Master the art of timed attacks by pressing Space precisely when the moving target enters colored zones on the timing bar. Perfect hits deal maximum damage and fill your Special Gauge faster. Once your Special Gauge is full, unleash a devastating Special Attack with Shift. Defeat all enemies in each level to progress, but be careful - if your HP reaches zero, it's game over!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
SPACE: Execute timed attack (press when target is in colored zones) / Continue through menus
SHIFT: Activate Special Attack (when gauge is full)
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Pixel Drift Race
description: Race through increasingly challenging tracks in this top-down arcade racer! Navigate your car through traffic, avoid obstacles, and master the art of drifting. Progress through suburban streets, busy city roads, and treacherous mountain passes before facing off against the ultimate boss car. Collect cash to upgrade your vehicle's engine, acceleration, and handling. Complete each level without losing all your health to advance. Can you defeat The Enforcer and claim victory?
controls:
Arrow Up / W: Accelerate (hold to maintain speed)
Arrow Left / A: Steer Left
Arrow Right / D: Steer Right
Space: Hard Brake / Drift (hold while turning for drift bonus)
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Pixel Fortress Siege
description: Deploy your warriors, archers, and sorcerers to destroy the enemy fortress while defending your Town Hall! Manage your gold wisely, choose the right units for each situation, and overcome increasingly difficult waves of enemies across 4 challenging levels. Each level brings tougher defenses and more aggressive enemy units. Can you master the art of siege warfare?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move deployment cursor
W: Select Warrior unit (Cost: varies by level)
A: Select Archer unit (Cost: varies by level)
S: Select Sorcerer unit (Cost: varies by level)
Space: Deploy selected unit at cursor position
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)

title: Pixel Gauntlet
description: Welcome to Pixel Gauntlet! You are a brave warrior navigating through 5 challenging levels filled with enemies and hazards. Defeat all enemies in each level to progress. Collect health potions to restore HP and attack boosts to deal more damage. Watch your health bar carefully - if it reaches zero, it's game over! Master the platforming, time your attacks, and conquer the final boss to win the game.
controls:
Arrow Left / A: Move Left
Arrow Right / D: Move Right
Arrow Up / W / Space: Jump
Z / Shift: Attack
Enter: Start Game
ESC: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Pixel Kick: Dream League
description: Score goals in this top-down soccer challenge! Aim your shot, adjust power, and apply curve to beat defenders and the goalkeeper. Progress through 5 increasingly difficult levels, each requiring precision and skill. Master the curve mechanic to bend shots around obstacles. Complete all levels to become the champion!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Adjust aim direction (Left/Right) and power (Up/Down)
Z: Apply left curve/spin to the ball
Shift: Apply right curve/spin to the ball
Space: Take the shot with current settings
Enter: Start game from main menu
Escape: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to main menu from game over screen

title: Pixel Ponder
description: Welcome to Pixel Ponder! Your mission is to spot all the subtle differences between two nearly identical images before time runs out. Progress through three increasingly challenging levels—from a bright park scene to a mysterious forest. Each correct find earns points, but beware: incorrect clicks and hints cost you! Can you achieve the highest score while racing against the clock?
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to the start screen
SPACE: Use a hint (when available)
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options (when applicable)
Z: Quick return to main menu from game over/level complete screens

title: Pizza Tycoon Express
description: Welcome to Pizza Tycoon Express! Build your pizza empire by serving customers efficiently. Prepare dough, add toppings, bake pizzas, and serve them before customers lose patience. Earn money to purchase upgrades and hire employees to automate tasks. Complete 5 increasingly challenging levels by meeting monetary targets while keeping customers satisfied. Master the art of multitasking between counter and drive-thru orders to become the ultimate Pizza Tycoon!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the main menu
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select options
SPACE: Confirm menu selections
SHIFT: Activate Turbo Mode (temporary speed boost)
Z: Toggle Upgrade Menu

title: Prison Breakout Challenge
description: Escape from prison within 3 minutes! Navigate through 3 challenging levels, each with guards patrolling the area. Find keys, disable security systems, and unlock doors to reach the exit. Stay out of the guards' sight - if they spot you, they'll chase you down. Get caught and it's game over! Complete all objectives and escape before time runs out to advance to the next level. Can you break out of all three levels?
controls:
A/D or Left/Right Arrow: Move left/right
Space: Jump
Z: Interact with objects (keys, doors, switches)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Puffy Pup Patrol
description: Welcome to Puffy Pup Patrol! Your beloved dog is feeling stressed and its head is swelling up! Your mission is to calm your pup by tracing soothing comfort patterns that appear over its head. Watch the Swelling Meter carefully - if it reaches 100%, your pup becomes too distressed! Complete all 5 levels by successfully healing your dog with accurate and speedy pattern traces. Each level introduces new challenges including faster swelling, more complex patterns, and pesky distractions. Can you become the Master Healer?
controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ARROW KEYS: Draw comfort patterns (move cursor to trace the target shape)
SPACE: Confirm drawing / Advance screens
ESC: Pause / Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen
SHIFT: Alternative pause key

title: Reel Relax: Angler's Journey
description: Welcome to Reel Relax: Angler's Journey! Master the art of fishing across 4 beautiful locations, from tranquil lakes to the deep ocean. Charge your cast for distance, then carefully manage line tension to reel in fish. Each catch earns you cash to upgrade your gear and unlock new fishing spots. Catch common fish for steady income, or chase rare legendary catches for massive rewards. Complete each location's objectives to progress, but watch your line durability - too much tension and it snaps! Can you catch them all and conquer the Deep Ocean Trench?
controls:
ENTER: Start Game / Confirm Selection
SPACE: Hold to charge cast power, release to cast / Hold to reel in fish / Select menu options
ARROW UP/DOWN: Navigate menus
ARROW LEFT/RIGHT: Browse gear/locations in menus
ESC: Pause game / Back to previous menu
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)
S: Select/Equip gear in shop
D: View details/unlock locations

title: Rhythm Flow Arcade
description: Welcome to Rhythm Flow Arcade! Match the rhythm by pressing the correct keys as colored notes flow down the screen. Hit notes precisely when they reach the hit zone at the bottom to score points and build combos. Maintain your life bar by hitting notes accurately - Perfect and Great hits fill it up, while misses drain it quickly. Survive through 5 increasingly challenging levels, each with faster tempos and more complex patterns. Master the timing, build massive combos, and achieve the highest score!
controls:
A: Hit notes in Lane 1 (leftmost, red)
S: Hit notes in Lane 2 (left-center, blue)
D: Hit notes in Lane 3 (right-center, green)
W: Hit notes in Lane 4 (rightmost, yellow)
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to main menu (from game over or pause)
SPACE: Confirm menu selections

title: Sakamoto's Deadly Delivery
description: Welcome to Sakamoto's Deadly Delivery! Your mission: guide a dangerous package from the start point to the green drop-off zone. In the Design Phase, strategically place blocks, ramps, and springs to create a safe path. Avoid spikes and enemy bots that will destroy your package. Once ready, start the simulation and watch physics take over. Complete all 5 increasingly challenging levels by solving each puzzle efficiently. Time and object usage affect your score!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to main menu (from game over screen)
Z: Select Block for placement
X: Select Ramp for placement
Arrow Left/Right: Rotate selected object
SPACE: Start/Stop simulation
SHIFT: Reset level (clear all placed objects)

title: Shadow Blade Ascent
description: Shadow Blade Ascent is a 2D side-scrolling action RPG where you control a shadow knight through 5 increasingly challenging levels. Battle waves of shadow enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and level up your character to unlock new skills. Collect gold for points, use health and mana potions strategically, and master your combat abilities including attacks, dodges, and special skills. Your goal is to defeat all 5 bosses and conquer the Dark Lord's Throne Room!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left/right
Arrow Up: Jump (or climb up when on ladder)
Arrow Down: Drop through platform (or climb down when on ladder)
Z: Basic Attack
Shift: Dodge/Dash (grants brief invulnerability)
Space: Special Skill 1 (close-range area attack)
W: Special Skill 2 (ranged projectile, unlocked at level 2)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Shadow Takedown: Ninja Stealth
description: You are a master ninja assassin infiltrating enemy territory. Your mission: eliminate all primary targets marked in red while avoiding detection by patrolling guards. Use the shadows to your advantage, time your movements carefully, and utilize environmental tools like vents for quick escapes and explosive barrels for strategic eliminations. One mistake means mission failure—stay hidden, stay silent, and complete your objectives to become the ultimate Shadow Takedown master.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move ninja (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Context action - Silent takedown (near enemy) / Use vent (on vent) / Detonate barrel (near barrel)
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to main menu)

title: Shawarma Stack
description: Welcome to Shawarma Stack! You run a shawarma restaurant and must fulfill customer orders quickly and accurately. Each customer shows their order in a speech bubble - add the exact ingredients they request, then serve. Timely and perfect orders earn bonus points and maintain your reputation. If your reputation drops to 0% or you fail to meet level objectives, it's game over. Complete all 5 levels to become a Shawarma Legend!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select sauces (Up: Garlic Sauce, Down: Tahini Sauce)
Z: Add Meat
Space: Serve Order
ENTER: Start Game / Confirm
ESC: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart (from Game Over screen)
Shift: Quick pause toggle during gameplay

title: Sizzle Skewers
description: Welcome to Sizzle Skewers! Match 3 or more identical skewers to clear them from the grill. Complete level objectives within the move limit to progress. Create special boosters by matching 4 or 5 skewers in a row. Clear burnt blocks by matching adjacent tiles. Plan your moves carefully to achieve high scores and earn 3 stars on each level!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor to select tiles
Space: Select/deselect tile (first press selects, second press deselects)
W/A/S/D: When tile is selected, swap it in the Up/Left/Down/Right direction
Z: Activate Flame Booster (when cursor is on it)
Shift: Activate Grill Flip Booster (when cursor is on it)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Skat Solo Challenge
description: Welcome to Skat Solo Challenge! Master the classic German card game of Skat across three challenging levels. Compete against two AI opponents in trick-taking rounds where strategy is key. As the declarer, you'll bid, choose your game type, and aim to collect at least 61 card points from your tricks. As an opponent, work to stop the declarer from succeeding. Win 2 out of 3 rounds per level to advance. Progress from Novice to Apprentice to Master, facing increasingly intelligent AI opponents. Earn bonus points for special achievements like Schneider and Schwarz victories. Can you become the Skat Master?
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Select card in your hand
Space: Play selected card
Arrow Up: Increase bid during bidding phase
Arrow Down: Pass during bidding phase
Shift: Take Skat cards (when declarer)
Z: Discard selected card (when discarding phase)
Enter: Start game / Confirm selections
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Skyward Shield
description: Guide your balloon safely upward through increasingly challenging obstacle courses! Use your shield to push obstacles out of the way before they collide with your rising balloon. Complete 4 levels of escalating difficulty by reaching target heights. One collision ends your run - stay alert and master the shield to protect your balloon!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from main menu
Arrow Keys: Move shield up/down/left/right
SHIFT + Arrows: Move shield faster
SPACE: Pause/Resume game
ESC: Pause/Resume game
R: Restart (returns to main menu)

title: Spider Stack Solitaire
description: Spider Stack Solitaire is a challenging card game where you must clear a tableau of 104 cards by building 8 complete King-to-Ace sequences of the same suit. Move cards between columns to form descending sequences, flip hidden cards, and strategically use your 5 deals to complete all sequences. Progress through 4 levels of increasing difficulty from 1 suit to 4 suits. Plan your moves carefully to maximize your score and minimize the number of moves!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between cards when a card is selected
Space: Auto-move selected card to first valid column, or auto-hint if no card selected
Z: Undo last move
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Spud Survivor
description: You are a brave potato survivor fighting waves of vegetable enemies! Your weapon auto-fires at the nearest threat. Survive increasingly difficult waves across 3 levels, collect experience to level up and gain powerful stat boosts, gather materials to purchase upgrades between levels, and defeat the final boss to claim victory. Stay mobile, manage your health, and become the ultimate Spud Survivor!
controls:
W: Move Up
A: Move Left
S: Move Down
D: Move Right
Shift: Dash (quick speed boost with cooldown)
Space: Confirm selection in menus
Enter: Start game from menu
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to menu from game over)

title: Sushi Sprint
description: Welcome to Sushi Sprint! Manage your sushi restaurant by serving customers efficiently. Take orders, prepare dishes at kitchen stations, serve food, and collect payments before customers lose patience. Earn gold to unlock recipes and upgrade your kitchen. Complete level objectives within the time limit to progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels. Keep your reputation high and don't let too many customers leave unhappy!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Scroll camera view
Space: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause game

title: TenTen Trials
description: Match falling geometric symbols by pressing the correct key when they reach the hit zone at the bottom of the screen. Progress through 5 challenging levels, each requiring 15 correct matches. Watch your misses - exceed the limit and it's game over! Build combos for bonus points and aim for the high score.
controls: W: Match Star (Yellow) | A: Match Circle (Red) | S: Match Square (Blue) | D: Match Triangle (Green) | ENTER: Start Game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to Menu

title: Terrain Scramble
description: Navigate your physics-based vehicle across challenging procedurally-generated terrain! Your goal is to travel the required distance for each level without running out of fuel or crashing. Collect fuel canisters to keep moving, perform flips for bonus points, and master the art of balancing speed with control. Complete all three levels to win!
controls:
ENTER: Start game from start screen
Arrow Right: Accelerate forward
Arrow Left: Brake / Reverse
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Territory Tides
description: Territory Tides is a turn-based strategy game where you must conquer territories to dominate the map. Each turn, you'll reinforce your armies, launch attacks on enemy territories, and fortify your borders. Capture all territories to advance through increasingly challenging levels. Control continents for bonus armies and eliminate AI opponents to achieve victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate and select territories (in combination with clicks)
Arrow Up/Down: Adjust army count for deployment, attack, or fortification
Space: Confirm actions (deploy armies, attack, fortify)
Shift: Advance to next phase of your turn
Z: Skip remaining phases and end your turn
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game

title: Thread Logic
